name: create_footnote
description: Tool to create a new footnote in a google document. use this when you need to add a footnote at a specific location or at the end of the document body.

index.description:
The zero-based index, in UTF-16 code units. The index is relative to the beginning of the segment specified by segment_id.
Example: 100

tabId.description:
The tab that the location is in. When omitted, the request is applied to the first tab.
Example: "t.1a2b3c4d5e6f7g8h9i0j"

segmentId.description:
The ID of the header, footer or footnote the location is in. An empty segment ID signifies the document's body.
Example: "h.1a2b3c4d5e6f7g8h9i0j"

location.description: Inserts the footnote reference at a specific index in the document. The segmentId within this Location object must be empty as footnotes can only be inserted in the document body.

documentId.description:
The ID of the document to create the footnote in.
Example: "1a2b3c4d5e6f7g8h9i0j"

tabId.description:
The tab that the location is in. When omitted, the request is applied to the first tab.
Example: "t.1a2b3c4d5e6f7g8h9i0j"

segmentId.description:
The ID of the header, footer or footnote the location is in. An empty segment ID signifies the document's body.
Example: "h.1a2b3c4d5e6f7g8h9i0j"

endOfSegmentLocation.description: Inserts the footnote reference at the end of the document body. The segmentId within this EndOfSegmentLocation object must be empty.
